memoryArtifacts.headline: Kilchurn Castle was built in the mid-1400s, and it remained the base of the mighty Campbells of Glenorchy for 150 years. After the first Jacobite Rising of 1689, Kilchurn was converted into a garrison stronghold, but was abandoned by the end of the 1700s.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena Lennox Menteith於1285年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾時，她的父親John Mor Earl of Lennox17歲，母親Marjorie Campbell17歲。她於1309年與Colin Callen Oig Campbell在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1343年5月2日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年58歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena Lennox Menteith于1285年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾时，她的父亲John Mor Earl of Lennox17岁，母亲Marjorie Campbell17岁。她于1309年与Colin Callen Oig Campbell在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1343年5月2日在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍享年58岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, which is also the name of an earldom. It originated as a local name from a district north of Glasgow formerly known as The Levenach. As a given name it was borne by the British composer Sir Lennox Berkeley ( 1903–89 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Helena Lennox Menteith was born in 1285, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Mor Earl of Lennox, was 17 and her mother, Marjorie Campbell, was 17. She married Colin Callen Oig Campbell in 1309, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 May 1343, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena Lennox Menteith est née en 1285, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mor Earl of Lennox, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Campbell, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Colin Callen Oig Campbell en 1309, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1343, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse.

Sie hat 1309 in Argyll, Scotland Colin Callen Oig Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1343 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Colin Callen Oig Campbell nel 1309, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 maggio 1343, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Helena Lennox Menteithが1285年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Mor Earl of Lennoxは17歳，母Marjorie Campbellは17歳であった。1309年にスコットランドアルグイルでColin Callen Oig Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1343年5月2日にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで58歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルロチャウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena Lennox Menteith(이)가 1285년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mor Earl of Lennox(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjorie Campbell(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1309년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Colin Callen Oig Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 5월 2일 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Colin Callen Oig Campbell em 1309, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1343, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena Lennox Menteith родилась в 1285 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mor Earl of Lennox было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Campbell, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Colin Callen Oig Campbell в 1309 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 мая 1343 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия.
